survey_metadata.topic: Zero-Shot Fault Diagnosis Based on Generative Dual-Path Diffusion Model with Data Augmentation
survey_metadata.target_journal: IEEE Transactions on Instrumentation and Measurement

key_references.title: Cycle-Consistent Generating Network Based on Semantic Distance for Zero-Shot Fault Diagnosis
key_references.authors: Wenjie Liao, Like Wu, Shihui Xu, Shigeru Fujimura
key_references.journal: IEEE Transactions on Instrumentation and Measurement
key_references.methodology: CycleGAN with semantic distance guidance and attribute consistency
key_references.notes: State-of-the-art zero-shot fault diagnosis, example paper for methodology

key_references.title: Power Transformer Winding Fault Diagnosis Method Based on Time-Frequency Diffusion Model and ConvNeXt-1D
key_contributions: Time-frequency diffusion model for data augmentation
key_references.notes: Recent diffusion model application in fault diagnosis

key_references.title: A New Data Augmentation Model for Fault Diagnosis of Transformer Windings Under Scarce Fault Data
key_references.notes: Demonstrates diffusion model superiority for scarce data

key_references.title: Limited-Data Augmentation for Fault Diagnosis in Lithium-Ion Battery Energy Storage Systems via Transferable Conditional Diffusion
key_contributions: High-quality synthetic fault data for rare conditions
key_references.notes: Transfer learning approach for diffusion models

key_references.title: Augmentation Framework for HVAC Fault Diagnosis Based on Denoising Diffusion Models
key_references.methodology: DDPM with GAF transformation and ResCUA-Net
key_references.notes: Demonstrates diffusion superiority over GAN-VAE hybrid

key_references.title: Diffusion Model-Assisted Cross-Domain Fault Diagnosis for Rotating Machinery Under Limited Data
key_contributions: Diffusion model for target domain augmentation
key_references.notes: Addresses domain shift with diffusion models

key_references.title: A Fault Diagnosis Data Augmentation Method Integrating Multimodal Non-Gaussian Denoising Diffusion Generative Adversarial Network
key_contributions: Replaces adversarial training with physical diffusion
key_references.notes: Interesting hybrid approach combining diffusion and GAN

key_references.title: Fault Direct Attributes Prediction for Zero-Shot Fault Diagnosis
key_references.notes: Foundational work in zero-shot fault diagnosis

key_references.notes: Important baseline for attribute consistency

key_references.notes: Demonstrates dual-path architecture effectiveness

key_references.title: Optimization of Deep Learning Architecture Based on Multi-Path Convolutional Neural Network Algorithm

key_references.methodology: Large language model for semantic refinement
key_references.notes: Novel LLM application for domain shift

key_references.title: Simulation-Data Driven Generalized Zero-Shot Learning for Multi-Agent Bearing Compound Fault Diagnosis

benchmark_datasets.name: Tennessee Eastman Process (TEP)
benchmark_datasets.description: Chemical process simulation with 21 fault modes and 52 variables

benchmark_datasets.name: Case Western Reserve University (CWRU) Bearing Dataset
benchmark_datasets.description: Bearing fault diagnosis with multiple fault types and severities

benchmark_datasets.name: Three-Phase Transmission System (TPTS)
benchmark_datasets.description: Electrical fault diagnosis with 6 fault classes

benchmark_datasets.name: Hydraulic System Dataset
benchmark_datasets.description: Real-world hydraulic system with 144 fault categories

benchmark_datasets.name: ASHRAE Dataset
benchmark_datasets.description: Chiller unit faults with imbalanced data

benchmark_datasets.name: SQI Planetary Gearbox Dataset
benchmark_datasets.description: Fine-grained fault diagnosis for planetary gearbox

benchmark_datasets.name: Paderborn University Bearing Dataset
benchmark_datasets.description: Real-world bearing faults with multiple sensors

metrics.name: Accuracy
metrics.typical_reporting: Per classifier (LSVM, NRF, PNB, MLP, CNN)

metrics.name: F1-Score
metrics.description: Harmonic mean of precision and recall

metrics.name: Pearson Correlation Coefficient (PCC)
metrics.description: Correlation between generated and real features

metrics.name: Fréchet Inception Distance (FID)
metrics.description: Distance between generated and real distributions

metrics.name: Inception Score (IS)
metrics.description: Quality and diversity of generated samples

research_gaps.gap: Limited diffusion models for zero-shot fault diagnosis
research_gaps.description: Most diffusion work focuses on data augmentation, not zero-shot scenarios
research_gaps.opportunity: Develop diffusion-based zero-shot fault diagnosis framework

research_gaps.description: Dual-path architectures proven effective but not integrated with diffusion
research_gaps.opportunity: Design dual-path diffusion model for fault diagnosis

research_gaps.gap: Insufficient domain shift mitigation in diffusion models
research_gaps.description: Existing diffusion methods don't explicitly address domain shift
research_gaps.opportunity: Incorporate attribute consistency in diffusion framework

research_gaps.description: Semantic distance not explored in diffusion model context

technical_challenges.problem: GANs suffer from mode collapse and vanishing gradients
Generated unseen samples deviate from real distribution

architecture.path_2: Frequency feature extraction (2D convolutions on spectrograms)

domain_shift_mitigation.mechanism_1: Integrate attribute regressor in diffusion process
domain_shift_mitigation.mechanism_2: Attribute-consistent loss at each denoising step

expected_contributions: First diffusion-based zero-shot fault diagnosis framework
Novel dual-path architecture for fault feature extraction
Attribute consistency mechanism in diffusion process
